## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX to discuss progress, address concerns, and align on next steps for their organic growth collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [ROI model for organic growth needs further discussion; separate call planned with Yoshita, Marcel, and Jordan](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Custom agent directory page needs refinement; expectations around design implementation to be clarified](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [GrowthX's work is showing positive early signals in organic growth metrics](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Communication and expectation alignment are crucial for smooth collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Topics

### ROI Model for Organic Growth

  - [Complex to quantify due to nuances and indirect impacts](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Best compared against opportunity cost or next best alternative (e.g., ads, outbound)](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Key factors: brand lift, increased brand search (5-7x higher conversion), larger retargeting pool](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Compounding effect over time, not linear growth](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Separate call planned with Yoshita, Marcel, and Jordan to dive deeper](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Custom Agent Directory Page Feedback

  - [Current implementation doesn't match Vapi's design expectations](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Issues with titles, layout, and overall user experience](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Yoshita expressed concern about the gap between team quality and output](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [Marcel clarified GrowthX's scope isn't full web design/development, but rather growth strategy and content](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Agreement to make basic changes and ship the page to start gathering data](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)

### Growth Metrics and Performance

  - [Clicks and impressions per month have doubled in the 12-week performance breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [8-9% daily CTR on pages is considered high](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [21,000 impressions on built pages](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Positive signals to search engines about content quality and user intent match](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [GrowthX content performance can be isolated in Looker dashboard for clearer attribution](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

### Collaboration and Expectations

  - [Yoshita expressed appreciation for GrowthX team's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing speed of execution with attention to detail](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [Agreement to improve communication on expectations and results interpretation](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule separate call with Yoshita, Marcel, and Jordan to discuss ROI model in depth](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Make basic improvements to the custom agent directory page and ship it](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Add links to top pages mentioned in the update list for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1779.0)
  - [GrowthX to send a recap of the meeting and address feedback](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and reporting on growth metrics, with clearer attribution to GrowthX efforts](https://fathom.video/share/AG2YmWsP2yezesJL3eAoMxWiKMyh1HdM?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
